global_rules.accessibility: High contrast ratio for sunlight visibility. Minimum 7:1 for text.
global_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
global_rules.aesthetic: Public health / epidemiological surveillance. Strictly no purple/violet AI slop gradients.

mobile.action_zones: Bottom 50% of the screen for primary actions. Important CTAs fixed at bottom.
mobile.padding: p-4 to p-6 for generous hit areas.
mobile.gap: gap-4 between form groups, gap-2 within items.

web.grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) with gap-6.

large_action_button.style: h-20 bg-[#1D4ED8] text-white text-2xl font-bold rounded-2xl shadow-md flex items-center justify-center w-full active:bg-[#1E3A8A] mb-4

status_pills.style: px-4 py-3 rounded-full font-bold text-sm uppercase flex items-center gap-2 border-2

criadouro_chips.description: Calha, Pneu, Caixa D'água, Lixo, Vasos
criadouro_chips.style: h-16 flex items-center justify-center px-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-[#9CA3AF] bg-white font-bold text-black active:border-[#1D4ED8] active:bg-[#EFF6FF]

sync_status_bar.style: h-10 w-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white

login_form.style: Inputs with h-16, text-lg, border-2 border-[#9CA3AF] rounded-lg p-4 bg-white focus:border-[#1D4ED8]
login_form.button: h-16 w-full bg-[#1D4ED8] text-white font-bold rounded-lg mt-8

kpi_cards.description: Total visitas, imóveis fechados, focos, taxa de sync
kpi_cards.style: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-[#CBD5E1] shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between

heatmap_container.style: h-[600px] w-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-[#CBD5E1] relative z-0

filter_chips.style: h-10 px-4 rounded-full border border-[#CBD5E1] bg-white text-sm font-semibold text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] cursor-pointer

risk_zone_list.description: Lista de zonas de alto risco
risk_zone_list.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-[#CBD5E1] divide-y divide-[#F1F5F9]

alert_button.style: h-12 px-6 bg-[#DC2626] text-white font-bold rounded-lg shadow hover:bg-[#B91C1C] flex items-center gap-2

instructions_to_main_agent: Mobile Field App: ALL primary buttons must be strictly 56px-64px minimum height and positioned in the lower half of the screen for monomanual (one-handed) operation.
Mobile Contrast Rule: Ensure pure solid borders (2px) on form elements and chips so they do not wash out under bright sunlight.
Aesthetic: Strictly public health. Use the defined Work Sans & IBM Plex Sans. NO AI slop gradients. NO purple or teal.
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to EVERY interactive element (buttons, inputs, filters).
Language: Entire app, including placeholders and statuses, must be in pt-BR.
Registration Flow: Keep the mobile reporting flow to 3 clicks maximum. Use large target chips for 'Visitado', 'Fechado', 'Foco'.
Dashboard: Use Shadcn components for Web but customize to remove the generic 'Vercel look' by applying solid defined borders and high contrast typography.
